sessionStart.bash: mkdir -p "$HOME/.groundcrew/sessions" && ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && echo "$ROOT" > "$HOME/.groundcrew/project-$PPID" && echo "$ROOT" > "$HOME/.groundcrew-active-project"

SKILL_SRC=$(find "$HOME/.copilot/installed-plugins" -path "*/groundcrew/skills/dispatch/SKILL.md" 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$SKILL_SRC" ] && [ ! -f "$HOME/.copilot/skills/dispatch/SKILL.md" ]; then mkdir -p "$HOME/.copilot/skills/dispatch" && cp "$SKILL_SRC" "$HOME/.copilot/skills/dispatch/SKILL.md"; fi

postToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName'); RESULT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolResult.resultType'); [ -d "$HOME/.groundcrew" ] && echo "$(date -u +%%Y-%%m-%%dT%%H:%%M:%%SZ),$TOOL,$RESULT" >> "$HOME/.groundcrew/tool-history.csv" || true
